title: Real Banhammer
description: Wield the ultimate authority! Strike players to ban them instantly and obliterate mobs with a single hit.
body:
Introducing the Real Banhammer mod - the epitome of in-game authority! Ever wished to have the power to uphold server justice with a single swing? With the Banhammer, you can instantly ban mischievous players, leaving a unique message to mark their exit. But that's not all; non-player entities don't stand a chance either, as a single blow will erase them from existence.

For server admins and those with the right privileges, spawning a Banhammer for personal use is easy. Simply use the command: `/give @p realbanhammer:black_banhammer` and the power is yours. Remember, with great power comes great responsibility. Use wisely and uphold the balance of your Minecraft world!
